title: caruelina anisomeris
intro: Caruelina anisomeris, also known as the California root or California anisomeris, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Mexico, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible roots. The medicinal properties of Caruelina anisomeris include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of consuming Caruelina anisomeris include improved cardiovascular health, reduced risk of kidney stones, and relief from symptoms of menopause. Caruelina anisomeris can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
